name: prayoga
description: Mechanistic-interpretability toolkit for refusal in LLMs: extract the refusal direction, run abliteration dose-response (EC50), measure refusal-subspace dimensionality, the qualified symmetry/order parameter, redacted trajectory dynamics, active-inference SAE-feature circuit discovery, the ṣaṭkarma intervention taxonomy, and the AgentDojo agentic-injection pilot. Includes local preflight and dual-use safety gates.
